theme: 一只茶仓抽屉里的茶荷、银茶则和白瓷公道杯，为什么真正让人上头的是把器物排成自己的安静秩序

items.source: 01_拉开茶仓抽屉露出整齐排布的茶荷和茶则.png
items.title: 拉开茶仓抽屉露出整齐排布的茶荷和茶则
items.description: 抽屉一拉开就能看出这不是喝茶道具，而是一套被反复整理过的安静秩序。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a tea storage drawer opening to reveal neatly arranged tea scoops and silver tea tools, calm adult collecting ritual, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 02_白瓷公道杯和亚麻布并排靠在抽屉边.png
items.title: 白瓷公道杯和亚麻布并排靠在抽屉边
items.description: 白瓷和亚麻并排的时候，整个茶仓会有一种近乎过分克制的美。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, white porcelain fairness cup beside folded linen at the edge of a tea drawer, restrained tactile elegance, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 03_银茶则在晨光里压出一条冷白反光.png
items.title: 银茶则在晨光里压出一条冷白反光
items.description: 银器那条细细的反光，会让人理解为什么有人愿意为一只茶则反复比较。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a silver tea scoop catching a cool strip of morning light inside a tea drawer, fine metal detail, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 04_木格抽屉里分区放好的茶荷和小茶匙.png
items.title: 木格抽屉里分区放好的茶荷和小茶匙
items.description: 分格收纳会把普通器物变成一种可以被模仿的生活样板。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, tea scoops and small tea spoons sorted into wooden drawer compartments, orderly collector arrangement, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 05_收席后倒扣晾着的白瓷公道杯.png
items.title: 收席后倒扣晾着的白瓷公道杯
items.description: 倒扣晾着的时刻比正式泡茶更像真实生活，也更容易让人保存。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, white porcelain fairness cup upside down to dry after tea service, subtle domestic tea ritual, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 06_茶荷边缘留着一点未扫净的茶末.png
items.title: 茶荷边缘留着一点未扫净的茶末
items.description: 那一点没有完全扫净的茶末，会让整组画面从摆拍变成真正有人用过。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a tea scoop with a trace of loose tea leaves still on the edge, intimate realism and tactile calm, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 07_深色木抽屉里一字排开的三只白瓷杯.png
items.title: 深色木抽屉里一字排开的三只白瓷杯
items.description: 白瓷在深木里的留白感，会让器物比茶汤本身更像主角。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, three white porcelain cups lined up inside a dark wood drawer, minimalist contrast and calm collecting aesthetic, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 08_茶巾下露出半截银茶则和木柄夹子.png
items.title: 茶巾下露出半截银茶则和木柄夹子
items.description: 半藏半露的工具最有故事感，也最像成年人的私密偏好。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, half-hidden silver tea scoop and wooden clip under a tea towel, quiet intimate still-life, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 09_准备待客前先在抽屉里重新摆正器物.png
items.title: 准备待客前先在抽屉里重新摆正器物
items.description: 待客前先重新摆正器物的动作，本身就是一种不说出口的仪式。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, hands straightening tea tools inside a drawer before guests arrive, anticipatory hosting ritual, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 10_靠窗茶柜里的公道杯映出柔和天光.png
items.title: 靠窗茶柜里的公道杯映出柔和天光
items.description: 只是一点天光映在杯身上，就足够让这只公道杯像一件安静收藏。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, porcelain fairness cup near a window reflecting soft daylight from a tea cabinet, serene minimal still life, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 11_抽屉最里层放着备用茶荷和折好的亚麻布.png
items.title: 抽屉最里层放着备用茶荷和折好的亚麻布
items.description: 备用器物折叠整齐的时候，秩序感会比稀有感更让人上头。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, spare tea scoops and folded linen stored in the inner layer of a tea drawer, quiet order and tactile beauty, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 12_收回抽屉前最后看一眼排好的茶器.png
items.title: 收回抽屉前最后看一眼排好的茶器
items.description: 抽屉推回去前那一眼，很像成年人给自己留的一个小型结尾镜头。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, final glance at perfectly arranged tea tools just before closing a storage drawer, reflective closing frame, no logos, no readable text.
